source_name: Code4rena Reserve Protocol Invitational Findings and Analysis Report (2023-07)
finding_title: User can’t redeem from RToken based on CurveStableRTokenMetapoolCollateral when any underlying collateral of paired RToken’s price oracle is offline(timeout)
summary: The CurveStableMetapoolCollateral is intended for 2-fiattoken stable metapools that involve RTokens, such as eUSD-fraxBP. The metapoolToken coin0 is pairedToken, which is also a RToken, and the coin1 is lpToken, e.g. 3CRV. And the CurveStableRTokenMetapoolCollateral.tryPairedPrice uses RTokenAsset.price() as the oracle to get the pairedToken price:
root_cause: RToken redemption through CurveStableRTokenMetapoolCollateral is blocked when any paired RToken underlying oracle times out
broken_invariants: users should not lose redemption availability merely because an unrelated paired RToken underlying oracle is stale
metapool collateral adapters must isolate redemption-critical paths from nonessential paired-token oracle failures
composed collateral pricing should fail gracefully without blocking valid exits
attack_preconditions: the affected Reserve collateral/plugin/wrapper is deployed or configured in an RToken basket
the report-described oracle, reward, wrapper, or integration edge case is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, trader, or protocol participant able to trigger the affected pricing/trading/reward/withdrawal flow
trigger_actions: execute or wait for the report-described state transition
observe mispricing, reward misallocation, fund lock, or availability failure

impact.description: The CurveStableMetapoolCollateral is intended for 2-fiattoken stable metapools that involve RTokens, such as eUSD-fraxBP. The metapoolToken coin0 is pairedToken, which is also a RToken, and the coin1 is lpToken, e.g. 3CRV. And the CurveStableRTokenMetapoolCollateral.tryPairedPrice uses RTokenAsset.price() as the oracle to get the pairedToken price:

why_not_higher: final C4 severity is Medium; impact, preconditions, or scope are bounded relative to High
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify the exact collateral plugin/wrapper is in scope and configured
check whether oracle freshness, decimals, or external integration assumptions differ in the current target
confirm the issue affects value movement, redemption availability, or reward ownership rather than a harmless view mismatch
mitigations: The Fix.plus can’t handle the uint192 overflow error. Try to override _anyDepeggedOutsidePool for CurveStableRTokenMetapoolCollateral as: unchecked { uint192 mid = (high - low) / 2 + low; } The assert assert(low <= high) in the RTokenAsset.tryPrice has already protected everything. ### Assessed type DoS
